notes: The gate checks migrated React route files, route-critical DOM ids, shared App/Auth/Todo shell ids, key JSON audit artifacts including content-level evidence invariants, and non-empty screenshot artifacts.

Evidence invariants lock route smoke 21/21 pass, GitHub parity 21/21 pass with zero actionable issues, browser evidence manifest integrity, migration completion 9 pass / 1 Google-token pending, local production-boundary 4 pass / 1 Google-token skip, static build config safety, local readiness 8 pass / 2 partial, and Google token helper browser renderability.
It is intended to catch UI contract regressions before screenshot-based browser QA is regenerated.
